clauses.title: Building Envelope Thermal Performance
clauses.description: The building envelope shall achieve a thermal performance that falls within the range of the energy efficiency class for the building
clauses.requirement: The building envelope shall have an average thermal transmittance (U-value) and a solar heat-gain coefficient (SHGC) and target ffi to achieve energy efficiency class C or better as shown in Table 1.

clauses.title: Vertical Fenestration
clauses.description: Windows, doors, and glass doors shall meet thermal performance requirements
clauses.requirement: Vertical fenestration shall have a thermal transmittance (U-w) and solar heat gain coefficient (SHGC) not exceeding the values given in Table 2.
tshwane_checklist: Window schedule with sizes and types

clauses.title: Roof Assemblies
clauses.description: Roof assemblies shall have adequate thermal resistance
clauses.requirement: Roof assemblies shall have a thermal transmittance (U-value) not exceeding the values given in Table 3 for the relevant climate zone.

clauses.title: Walls - Above Ground
clauses.description: Above-ground walls shall meet thermal requirements
clauses.requirement: Walls above ground shall have a thermal transmittance (U-value) not exceeding 0.6 W/(m²·K) or be designed as a massive wall with a minimum 50 mm cross sectional area of thermal mass.

clauses.title: Floor Over Unconditioned Space
clauses.description: Floors over unconditioned spaces need thermal insulation
clauses.requirement: A floor that separates a habitable room from an unconditioned space shall have a thermal transmittance not exceeding 0.5 W/(m²·K)

clauses.title: Lighting - Lumen Method
clauses.description: Artificial lighting shall meet efficiency requirements via lumen method
clauses.requirement: For residential buildings, the total installed load of the artificial lighting shall not exceed 7 W/m² of floor area for interior lighting and 3 W/m² for exterior lighting.

clauses.title: Lighting - Watts per Square Metre
clauses.requirement: As an alternative to XA6, the installed efficacy of the artificial lighting shall be not less than 60 lumens per watt for interior lighting and 70 lumens per watt for exterior lighting.

clauses.title: Solar Water Heating
clauses.description: Mandatory solar water heating for residential buildings
clauses.requirement: In a residential building with a floor area of 100 m² or more, provision shall be made for a solar water heating system (SWS).

clauses.title: Service Hot Water Piping
clauses.description: Hot water piping shall be insulated
clauses.requirement: Service hot water piping shall be insulated with not less than 25 mm thickness of insulation having a thermal conductivity not exceeding 0.04 W/(m·K)

clauses.title: Roof Lights
clauses.requirement: Roof lights shall not have a thermal transmittance greater than 2.0 W/(m²·K) and the solar heat gain coefficient shall not exceed 0.35

clauses.title: Occupancy Classification
clauses.description: Building must be classified according to its intended occupancy type
clauses.requirement: The occupancy classification shall be clearly indicated on the plans and must comply with SANS 10400 Table 1

clauses.title: Means of Egress
clauses.description: Adequate escape routes must be provided
clauses.requirement: Every building shall have sufficient number of exits to allow safe evacuation

clauses.title: Site Plan Requirements
clauses.description: City of Tshwane site plan checklist
clauses.requirement: Site plan shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist

clauses.title: Floor Plan Requirements
clauses.description: City of Tshwane floor plan checklist
clauses.requirement: Floor plans shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist

clauses.title: Roof Plan Requirements
clauses.description: City of Tshwane roof plan checklist
clauses.requirement: Roof plans shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist

clauses.title: Elevations Requirements
clauses.requirement: Elevations shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist

clauses.title: Sections Requirements
clauses.requirement: Sections shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist

clauses.title: Structural Requirements
clauses.requirement: Structural drawings shall contain all required information as per Tshwane checklist
